title: Add FT-001 integration and e2e verification
verify: E2E covers catalog browse, category browse, required filters, search, combined search+filters, empty result state, and missing optional attributes.
Integration/e2e evidence uses seeded backend data and the Windows-native local runtime, not hardcoded frontend data.
REQ-001, REQ-002, and REQ-003 have executable evidence.

verify.summary: Fresh manual T2 verification passed. Smoke, backend integration, browser E2E, Memory Bank lint, strict doctor precheck, Playwright trace/screenshot, and port cleanup evidence cover FT-001 catalog browse, category browse, search, required filters, combined search and filters, empty result state, missing optional attributes, seeded PostgreSQL-backed data, and REQ-001 through REQ-003 without production data, live providers, or FT-002 product-detail/cart scope.

evidence_required: Storefront catalog e2e output, trace, screenshot, or video artifact links.
constraints: Do not use live providers, production secrets, or production data.
Do not verify FT-001 by bypassing the storefront/backend boundary.
invariants: No production secrets, production data, or live payment mutation may be used as proof.
Memory Bank must be synchronized after meaningful changes.
purpose: Provide executable acceptance evidence for FT-001 as a feature.
success_outcome: FT-001 catalog browsing, category, search, filters, and edge cases are verified through local integration/e2e evidence.
anti_goals: Do not mark FT-001 complete from unit tests alone.
Do not use production data or live providers.
Do not implement FT-002 product detail/add-to-cart behavior.

stop_conditions: Windows-native local runtime is not available from FT-011.
Tests cannot prove category/search/filter behavior through seeded backend data.
E2E coverage requires scope outside FT-001 acceptance criteria.
